notes.authentication: Requires Authorization header with Bearer token (HF_TOKEN or HF_API_TOKEN)
notes.pricing: Free tier with rate limits. PRO ($9/month) for higher limits. Inference Endpoints for dedicated instances
notes.streaming: Supported via text_generation endpoint with stream parameter
notes.rate_limits: Free: ~1000 requests/day. PRO: higher limits. Inference Endpoints: unlimited
notes.inference_api: Serverless API for quick testing - free with rate limits, shared infrastructure
notes.inference_endpoints: Dedicated instances with guaranteed availability, custom hardware, private deployment
notes.text_generation_inference: Open-source inference server (TGI) for self-hosting with optimized performance
notes.model_types: Text generation, embeddings, code, multimodal, speech, vision models available
notes.quantization: GPTQ, AWQ, GGUF quantized models available for reduced memory usage
notes.context_windows: Vary by model - from 2K to 200K+ tokens
notes.open_source: All models are open-source and can be downloaded for local use
notes.model_cards: Detailed documentation, licensing, and performance metrics for each model
notes.spaces: Deploy interactive demos with Gradio or Streamlit
notes.datasets: Access to 100K+ datasets for training and evaluation
notes.transformers: Official Python library for model usage: pip install transformers
notes.peft: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning with LoRA, QLoRA adapters
notes.autoawq: Automatic AWQ quantization for faster inference
notes.no_claude: Anthropic Claude models are NOT available on Hugging Face (proprietary)
notes.enterprise: Enterprise Hub for private model hosting, SSO, and compliance features

models.name: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct
models.description: Largest Llama 3.1 model with exceptional capabilities

models.name: Qwen/QwQ-32B-Preview
models.description: Qwen with reasoning and reflection capabilities

models.name: deepseek-ai/deepseek-llm-67b-chat
models.description: DeepSeek's large language model for conversation

models.name: codellama/CodeLlama-70b-Instruct-hf
models.description: Large Code Llama model for complex coding

models.name: sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2
models.description: Fast and efficient sentence embedding model

models.name: intfloat/e5-mistral-7b-instruct
models.description: E5 embedding model based on Mistral 7B

models.name: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0
models.description: Stable Diffusion XL for image generation

llama.description: Meta's Llama family - industry-leading open models

mistral.description: Mistral AI's efficient and multilingual models

qwen.description: Alibaba's Qwen family with strong coding capabilities

embeddings.description: Text embedding models for semantic search

inference_api.description: Serverless API for quick testing and prototyping
inference_api.pricing: Free with rate limits, PRO $9/month for higher limits

inference_endpoints.pricing: Pay per hour based on GPU type

transformers.description: Python library for running models locally

quantization.description: Reduce model size and memory usage

use_cases.bitsandbytes: Training and inference with limited memory

qlora.description: Quantized LoRA for even lower memory

enterprise_hub.description: Enterprise features for teams and organizations

datasets.description: Access to 100K+ datasets for training and evaluation

spaces.hardware: Upgrade to GPU/TPU for paid tiers

limitations.cold_starts: Possible on Inference API for unpopular models

best_practices.model_selection: Start with popular models, check model cards for details
best_practices.inference_api: Use for development and testing only
best_practices.inference_endpoints: Use for production with dedicated capacity
best_practices.quantization: Use quantized models for faster inference and lower memory
best_practices.version_control: Pin specific model versions for reproducibility
best_practices.local_testing: Test locally with transformers before deploying
best_practices.cost_optimization: Use appropriate hardware tier for workload

getting_started.step_2: Get API token from Settings > Access Tokens
getting_started.step_3: Install libraries: pip install huggingface_hub transformers
getting_started.step_4: Use Inference API or deploy Inference Endpoint

api_usage.python:
from huggingface_hub import InferenceClient
client = InferenceClient(token='your-token')
api_usage.javascript:
import { HfInference } from '@huggingface/inference'
const hf = new HfInference('your-token')

key_differentiators.open_source: All models are open-source and downloadable
key_differentiators.cost: Free tier available, competitive paid pricing

popular_use_cases.chatbots: Deploy conversational AI with Llama or Mistral
popular_use_cases.embeddings: Build semantic search with BGE or sentence-transformers
popular_use_cases.rag: Combine embedding models with text generation
